description: SpareBank 1 Nordmøre provides various banking products and services for businesses and individuals in Norway. It operates through Retail Market and Corporate Market segments. The company offers financing, leasing, payment processing, and consulting services; and accounting services, including agricultural accounting. It also provides usage, current, buffer, savings, deposit, business, currency, group, and investment accounts; fixed-rate deposits; mobile and online banking; bank and credit cards; savings products, including savings in funds, savings on account, stocks and investments, and savings for children and retirement; pension savings accounts and tax-advantaged retirement savings; mandatory occupational pensions; and cash services. In addition, the company offers mortgage loans for housing, cottages, and construction projects; car loans for new and used cars; loan transfers; proof of financing; consumer loans; refinancing of mortgages and consumer debt; vehicle loans for boats, caravans, and other vehicles; green loans; business loans; overdrafts; bank guarantees; construction loans; growth guarantee schemes; agricultural operating credit; and factoring. Further, it provides car, housing, person, animal, vehicle, travel, valuable item, vehicle and machine, building and value, employee/personnel, and agriculture insurance; property brokerage and valuation; payroll payment and reporting; business counseling; and investment in funds and shares. The company was formerly known as Sparebank 1 Nordvest and changed its name to SpareBank 1 Nordmøre in May 2021. The company was founded in 1835 and is based in Kristiansund, Norway.
